name: Pad Thai Prik
recipeIngredient: 11 ounces dried rice stick noodles (see note)
10 ounces small shrimp, peeled and cooked
recipeInstructions:
GARNISH
3 teaspoons dried shrimp
3 tablespoons chopped scallions
2 tablespoons chopped roasted peanuts
1 tablespoon granulated white sugar
4 garlic chives (cut into 1.5-inch lengths)
cilantro sprigs
lime wedges
1. Soak the noodles in hot water for at least 12 minutes to soften, then drain well.
2. Combine the sugar, fish sauce, ketchup, and chili sauce in a small bowl.
3. Prepare the garnish ingredients by placing the dried shrimp in a blender or spice grinder and grinding until finely shredded. Arrange the garnishes on a plate to serve with the noodles.
4. Heat the oil in a wok over medium heat. Add the garlic and fry until very aromatic, about 1 minute.
5. Add the shrimp and fry for 40 seconds, then pour in the sauce mixture and cook briefly.
6. Add the noodles and toss until thoroughly coated with the sauce. Continue cooking, adding half the bean sprouts and tossing continuously until they have softened.
7. Transfer to a platter, scattering the remaining bean sprouts over the top.
8. Serve with the platter of garnishes, allowing guests to add what they want, to taste.
